name: itportal/itportal
description: ITPortal - internal IT helpdesk and Support Maintenance Report (PHP native modular).

suggest.vlucas/phpdotenv: Optional .env loader; project ships with a minimal built-in loader.
suggest.ext-gd: Required by phpoffice/phpspreadsheet (uncomment extension=gd in php.ini).
suggest.ext-zip: Required by phpoffice/phpspreadsheet for .xlsx writing (uncomment extension=zip in php.ini).
